title: Command-Layer Resilience and Relay Over-Allocation Trade-Offs in Heterogeneous Multi-Robot Teams Under Delayed Hazard Information
author: BongKeun Song
claim_boundary: Physics-supported simulation study; no hardware or human-subject validation claim.
funding: This research received no specific grant funding from any funding agency in the public, commercial, or not-for-profit sectors.
use_of_generative_ai: ChatGPT (OpenAI) was used for language refinement, editorial drafting assistance, and code organization support in the manuscript and repository documentation; not to generate data, select models, derive results, or make scientific claims.
